saipen_version.description: Records which protocol version wrote this state, and doubles as the version guard (RFC § 1.2) -- one field, not split into a separate schema_version (collapsed in v7.23.0).

saipen_home.description: RFC § 1.7's bootloader pointer: absolute path to the SAIPEN home on the machine that last checkpointed. Dead path on this machine? Clone github.com/vacterro/saipen and update at the next checkpoint. MAY be absent on states written before v7.25.0 -- not in the required list for that reason.

goal_waves.description: Persisted safety-valve counter, RFC § 2.4. Present only while goal_mode is true.

goal_tickets.description: Persisted safety-valve counter, RFC § 2.4. Present only while goal_mode is true.

human_note.description: Optional one-line human->agent nudge, read on continue (RFC § 1.2) and cleared once applied. Not a ticket, not a goal -- a lightweight 'last time you did X, don't' channel.
